eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 11:12 AM on JUN 18, 2026 Effective until 7:12 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A SAFE Alert has been issued for Glendale Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Glendale Police Department is looking for Danny Gonzales last seen on on foot near 55th Avenue and Desert Cove Avenue wearing a white long sleeve hoodie, black shorts, black Vans tennis shoes.

If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
